action.reasoning: Observation: DKT achieved 0.7616 val AUC at epoch 8 but overfit afterwards. Analysis: SAKT (Self-Attentive Knowledge Tracing) might capture long-term dependencies better than LSTM. Decision: Train the SAKT model for 15 epochs to compare its performance with DKT.
